title: Global Settings

fields.label: Company Name
fields.name: company_name
fields.instructions: Legal/trading name as it appears site-wide. Verified from live site settings (wp_get_site_settings).

fields.label: Company Tagline
fields.name: company_tagline
fields.default_value: Cut Waste. Improve Profit. Fund the future

fields.label: Company Registration Number
fields.name: company_registration_number
fields.instructions: NOT YET SOURCED. The live footer currently states only “Registered in England” with no number. Do not populate with a placeholder or invented value — leave blank until the real registration number is confirmed by the client.

fields.label: Office Address
fields.name: office_address
fields.instructions: Verified from the live footer (Services, Leadership, Case Studies pages).

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.name: contact_email
fields.instructions: Verified: this is the email currently live in the site footer. Note it differs from the wp-admin account email (tjgriffiths@gmail.com) — confirm with the client whether a general company inbox (e.g. info@iep.technology) should replace this personal address before go-live.

fields.label: Contact Telephone
fields.name: contact_telephone
fields.instructions: Verified: this is the number currently live in the site footer (a director's personal mobile, per the Leadership page). Confirm with the client whether a general company line should replace it.

fields.label: LinkedIn URL
fields.name: linkedin_url
fields.instructions: PLACEHOLDER — the live footer currently links to the generic https://www.linkedin.com/, not a company page. CRN-001 lists “LinkedIn integration approach” as an open, unresolved decision. Do not treat this default as final.

fields.label: Primary Logo
fields.name: primary_logo
fields.instructions: The site's current logo is already uploaded as media ID 211 (site_logo, per wp_get_site_settings) — select the existing library item rather than re-uploading.

fields.label: White / Reversed Logo
fields.name: white_logo
fields.instructions: Already uploaded as media ID 1066 (iep-logo-white-nobg.png) — used today in the dark-background footer sections on Services/Leadership/Case Studies. Select the existing library item.

fields.label: Favicon
fields.name: favicon
fields.instructions: Already uploaded as media ID 1030 (site_icon, per wp_get_site_settings) — select the existing library item.

fields.label: Default Social Share Image
fields.name: default_social_image
fields.instructions: NOT YET SOURCED — no default Open Graph/social share image was identified anywhere in the verified site inventory. Needs a real asset from the client before use.

fields.label: Primary CTA Text
fields.name: primary_cta_text
fields.instructions: Verified: live on Services, Leadership and Case Studies pages today.

fields.label: Secondary CTA Text
fields.name: secondary_cta_text
fields.instructions: Verified: live alongside the Primary CTA on the same pages today.

fields.label: Global CTA Text
fields.name: global_cta_text
fields.instructions: NOT YET SOURCED. Intended as a fallback CTA label for templates/modules that don't specify their own Primary/Secondary CTA text. No distinct real value exists on the live site today — leave blank until an editorial decision is made; do not fill with invented marketing copy.

fields.label: Footer Copyright Text
fields.name: footer_copyright_text
fields.instructions: Verified: live in the footer of every 2026-redesign page today.
fields.default_value: © Industrial Energy Pioneers Limited. All rights reserved. · Registered in England · iep.technology

fields.label: Footer Legal Text
fields.name: footer_legal_text
fields.instructions: NOT YET SOURCED as free text. The live footer today links to Privacy Policy, Terms & Conditions, Cookie Policy, Careers and Resources as page links, not as a single text blob — that link structure is a footer-navigation/relationship concern for the CMS-001 footer-consolidation module, not this field. This field is reserved for an additional short legal/disclaimer sentence only if the business decides one is needed. Leave blank otherwise.

fields.label: Newsletter Text
fields.name: newsletter_text
fields.instructions: NOT YET SOURCED. CRN-001 records “Newsletter implementation” as an open, unresolved decision. MC4WP is installed and active as the site's newsletter mechanism, but no approved newsletter sign-up copy exists yet. Leave blank — do not invent marketing copy for this field.

description: Global Settings for Industrial Energy Pioneers Limited — CMS-003 deployment package. Field values below are the verified real values already live on iep.technology at the time this package was generated (2026-07-12), except where explicitly marked NOT YET SOURCED or PLACEHOLDER in the field instructions.
